title: More storage blocks
description: You can uncraft more blocks for better memory management
body:
## English

With this datapack/mod you can uncraft certain blocks.

The following recoveries are possible:

- Quartz Block → 4× Quartz
 
- Amethyst Block → 4× Amethyst Shard
 
- Brick Block → 4× Brick
  
- Resin Brick Block → 4× Resin Brick
  
- Nether Brick Block → 4× Nether Brick
  
- Nether Wart Block → 9× Nether Wart
  
- Wool → 4× String
  
- Packed Ice → 1× Ice
  
- Blue Ice → 9× Packed Ice
  
- Honeycomb Block → 9× Honeycomb

## Deutsch

Mit diesem Datapack/Mod kann man bestimmte Blöcke uncraften.

Folgende Rückgewinnungen sind möglich:

- Quartz Block → 4× Quartz
 
- Amethyst Block → 4× Amethyst Shard
 
- Brick Block → 4× Brick
  
- Resin Brick Block → 4× Resin Brick
  
- Nether Brick Block → 4× Nether Brick
  
- Nether Wart Block → 9× Nether Wart
  
- Wool → 4× String
  
- Packed Ice → 1× Ice
  
- Blue Ice → 9× Packed Ice
  
- Honeycomb Block → 9× Honeycomb
